title: Fresh and very-old tyre flags
summary: Add simple state flags for very fresh tyres, old tyres, and very old tyres using raw and compound-scaled thresholds.
rationale: Fresh-tyre and old-tyre states help capture the immediate aftermath of a stop and the build-up to the next one. The run frequently retained `FreshTyre` and old-for-compound style features.
implementation_hint: Create flags for tyre life at very low values, tyre life above compound-specific age bands, and very-old-for-compound. Interact these with late race, current `PitStop`, and degradation signals.
expected_effect: Small ROC AUC gain with medium-high confidence.
risk: Thresholds may be coarse; avoid splitting many tiny threshold variants into separate experiments.
